items.name: ai-job-cards
items.title: AI Job Cards
items.description: Three AI job card stacks with swipe-to-cycle. Brand logos, bookmark toggle, springs.

items.name: andromeda-button
items.title: Andromeda Button
items.description: A sci-fi / blueprint-aesthetic button with five variants (default, outline, ghost, destructive, link), three sizes (small, medium, large), optional leading icon, and full hover / focus / active / disabled state coverage. Transparent hairline surfaces sit on a near-black canvas, with an electric-blue accent that brightens and glows on interaction.

items.name: meet-the-crew
items.title: Meet the Crew
items.description: A swipeable portrait card stack perfect for introducing a team, showcasing crew members, or picking an avatar. Four stacked cards fan out with soft rotations — drag to browse, tap to choose. Drop in your own photos and names for an About Us section, a character selector, or an onboarding profile picker.

items.name: blind-pull-toggle
items.title: Blind Pull Toggle
items.description: A dark/light mode toggle styled as a window-blind pull cord — click to yank the cord and watch the icon swap through a venetian-blind slat animation.

items.name: bubble-field
items.title: Bubble Field
items.description: A grid of outline circles that burst on hover — each expanding and fading like a soap bubble popping, then reforming, with a soft pastel blue palette.

items.name: charging-widget
items.title: Charging Widget
items.description: Circular battery indicator with animated liquid waves that rise as the percentage counts up, looping continuously.

items.name: crypto-swap
items.title: Crypto Swap
items.description: A crypto token-swap widget with live exchange rates, price impact, and an animated swap button.

items.name: cube-carousel
items.title: Cube Carousel
items.description: An interactive 3D photo cube with six placeholder images on its faces. Drag with your cursor to spin it freely on both axes; release and it coasts naturally to a stop. No buttons, no snap, no controls, just the cube and your hand.

items.name: curious-ai
items.title: Curious AI
items.description: A morphing 3D AI orb in Three.js with cyan and magenta rim lights, iridescent pink speckles on a wrinkled surface, and glowing pink robot-eye pills that follow your cursor and blink between idle looks.

items.name: danger-stripes
items.title: Danger Stripes
items.description: Three crossing caution-tape stripes on orange. Hover to shake, click to intensify.

items.name: delete-button
items.title: Delete Button
items.description: A red button that starts a five-second delete countdown, with a one-tap undo.

items.name: distortion-grid
items.title: Distortion Grid
items.description: A canvas grid of thin lines that slowly undulate with large sweeping waves. Hovering repels the grid fabric outward from the cursor, amplifying the distortion across the entire canvas.

items.name: dot-grid
items.title: Dot Grid
items.description: A canvas-based dot grid background where hovering illuminates nearby dots with a smooth radial glow and organic fade.

items.name: emoji-burst
items.title: Emoji Burst
items.description: A button that explodes emojis outward in all directions. Five emoji sets cycle on each click.

items.name: expanding-tabs
items.title: Expanding Tabs
items.description: A monochrome tab bar of icon circles. Click one and it expands into a labeled pill.

items.name: flip-calendar
items.title: Flip Calendar
items.description: A desk-calendar widget showing dates 1–31 with a satisfying flip-clock page-turn animation.

items.name: traveldeck
items.title: Travel Deck
items.description: A swipeable deck of destination cards. Drag the front card down to fling it off-screen and reveal the next. Each card reveals an animated hotels counter as it comes forward.

items.name: glass-ai-compose
items.title: Glass AI Composer
items.description: Glassmorphism AI chat input with image upload, web search toggle, and model switcher.

items.name: glass-card
items.title: Glass Card
items.description: Glassmorphism content cards with 3D tilt-on-hover, spring physics, and a cursor-following glare highlight.

items.name: glass-dock
items.title: Glass Dock
items.description: Glassmorphism macOS-style dock with cursor-proximity magnification. Icons scale with spring physics as the mouse approaches.

items.name: glass-modal
items.title: Glass Modal
items.description: Centered dialog with deep glass blur, scale-spring entrance, and staggered content reveal.

items.name: glass-music-player
items.title: Glass Music Player
items.description: Mini music player with glass surface, spinning vinyl art, animated progress bar, and ambient glow.

items.name: glass-navbar
items.title: Glass Navbar
items.description: Frosted glass navigation bar with animated active tab indicator, ambient color blobs, and spring-physics entrance.

items.name: glass-notification
items.title: Glass Notifications
items.description: Swipe-to-dismiss notification stack with glass cards and spring-animated layout transitions.

items.name: glass-progress
items.title: Glass Progress
items.description: Glassmorphism progress bar panel with glowing gradient fills, spring-animated counters, staggered reveal, and replay button.

items.name: glass-search-bar
items.title: Glass Search Bar
items.description: Glassmorphism search bar with animated suggestion dropdown, active state glow, and reduced-motion support.

items.name: glass-sidebar
items.title: Glass Sidebar
items.description: Collapsible glassmorphism sidebar with icon-only and full label states, spring-animated expand and collapse.

items.name: glass-slider
items.title: Glass Slider
items.description: Range sliders with glass tracks, glowing colored fills, and spring-animated thumbs that scale on drag.

items.name: glass-stepper
items.title: Glass Stepper
items.description: Glassmorphism numeric stepper with spring number flip, notification-style tinted buttons, and configurable min/max/step.

items.name: glass-tab-bar
items.title: Glass Tab Bar
items.description: Frosted glass pill tab bar with a sliding active indicator. Edge tabs snap flush to the container wall.

items.name: glass-tags
items.title: Glass Tags
items.description: Selectable pill-shaped tags with glass surfaces, unique color accents, and spring-animated check marks.

items.name: glass-toast
items.title: Glass Toast
items.description: Frosted glassmorphism toast notification stack with 4 variants, auto-dismiss progress bar, and spring-animated stacking.

items.name: glass-toggle
items.title: Glass Toggle
items.description: On/off toggles with glass housing and liquid-feel spring animation. Track color transitions smoothly.

items.name: glass-user-menu
items.title: Glass User Menu
items.description: Frosted glass user avatar trigger with animated dropdown, grouped menu items, and Log Out.

items.name: glitch-button
items.title: Glitch Button
items.description: A terminal-inspired button with a text scramble glitch effect on hover.

items.name: good-vibes
items.title: Good Vibes
items.description: Interactive typography where letters scale 2x and become bold on hover.

items.name: grid-lines
items.title: Grid Lines
items.description: A dot grid connected by thin lines. On hover, a radial wave pulses outward from the cursor, illuminating lines and dots as it spreads.

items.name: halo-type
items.title: Halo Type
items.description: Rotating 3D ring text animation — the front arc reads upright, the back arc upside-down.

items.name: interactive-card-stack
items.title: Interactive Card Stack
items.description: A scattered stack of photo cards. Drag, click, or arrow keys to focus any card.

items.name: jar-of-emotions
items.title: Emoji Reaction Jar
items.description: Glass jar widget. Click a reaction to spring the lid and watch the emoji bounce down.

items.name: label-cards
items.title: Label Cards
items.description: Colour-blocked label cards scattered at random angles. Tap one to spring it to centre.

items.name: magnetic-dots
items.title: Magnetic Dots
items.description: A dense grid of dots that get magnetically pulled toward the cursor, snapping back with a satisfying elastic bounce when you leave.

items.name: mark-toggle
items.title: Mark Toggle
items.description: An iOS-style pill toggle in warm earth and sand tones — the thumb carries a small icon that morphs from X to checkmark as it slides across.

items.name: mood-tracker
items.title: Mood Tracker
items.description: A feelings check-in card with six expressive faces. Drag the segmented slider and the face, label, and liquid color wash shift with your mood.

items.name: neon-clock
items.title: Seven-Segment Clock
items.description: A retro 7-segment LCD clock with pixel-grid overlay. Shows live HH:MM:SS with blinking colon, AM/PM indicator, day of week row, and full date.

items.name: new-project-modal
items.title: New Project Modal
items.description: A pill button that morphs into a soft-UI project creation form — title, description, 7-swatch color label picker, Private toggle, and a checkmark-confirm Create button.

items.name: noise-bg
items.title: Grain Background
items.description: A canvas-based grain background of randomly scattered dots that illuminate with a soft Gaussian glow and organic connection lines on hover.

items.name: noise-field
items.title: Noise Field
items.description: A grid of flowing arrows driven by layered sine-wave noise — like wind mapped on a weather chart. Hover to create a swirling vortex at the cursor.

items.name: orbit
items.title: Orbit
items.description: Kinetic text animation arranged in a circle. Hover slows the spin; letters push outward.

items.name: particle-constellation
items.title: Spider Web
items.description: An organic silk web that breathes with a slow idle bow. Hover to physically push the nodes — each intersection bounces back with tension, fading the strings near your cursor.

items.name: particle-sphere
items.title: Particle Sphere
items.description: 9,000 particles arranged on a sphere with warm gold and cool silver tones, slowly spinning in Three.js.

items.name: peel-corner-reveal
items.title: Peel to Scan
items.description: A portrait card whose corner peels on tap, revealing a scannable Wi-Fi QR code.

items.name: pill-toggle
items.title: Pill Toggle
items.description: A minimal iOS-style slider toggle — thumb glides between off (grey) and on (green) with a snappy spring. Fully responsive.

items.name: playful
items.title: Playful
items.description: Kinetic typography where letters jump, drop, and rotate on cursor proximity.

items.name: polaroid-stack
items.title: Polaroid Stack
items.description: Five polaroid photo cards stacked in a casual pile — click to fan them out in a spring-animated arc, hover to lift, click a card to spotlight it.

items.name: product-card-deck
items.title: Product Card Deck
items.description: A draggable card deck you flick through one card at a time. The top card leans toward your drag, then spins away with momentum to reveal the next, and the deck loops endlessly. Every card pairs a picture with a title and a pill action button with hover and press states.

items.name: radial-cards
items.title: Radial Cards
items.description: Seven health-metric cards bloom into a slowly rotating flower — tap any petal to pull it forward and read your stats up close.

items.name: radial-toolbar
items.title: Radial Toolbar
items.description: A radial context menu that fans out formatting tools around a centre button, with active toggle states and an animated label pill.

items.name: responsive-letters
items.title: Responsive Letters
items.description: Interactive text where each letter responds to cursor proximity, animating variable font properties (weight, stretch, italic, letter-spacing, skew) to create a deformation-under-pressure effect.

items.name: ripple-type
items.title: Ripple Type
items.description: SVG text animation warped by a turbulence filter. Toggle the fan — letters ripple.

items.name: runway-loader
items.title: Runway Loader
items.description: An airplane taxis down a runway progress bar, nose tilting up and taking off at 100%.

items.name: scramble-text
items.title: Scramble Text
items.description: Two words scramble continuously in a pixel cipher. Hover the container to decrypt them one by one — mouse out and they snap back to noise.

items.name: signature-pad
items.title: Signature Pad
items.description: A signature pad widget — pill button morphs into a canvas to draw with mouse or touch.

items.name: slice-type
items.title: Slice Type
items.description: A typographic magic trick. At rest you read one ambiguous word; hover and it splits into two — LIGHT lifting up, NIGHT sinking down, the shared letters resolving into separate glyphs.

items.name: slide-deck
items.title: Slide Deck
items.description: Swipeable card deck with four editorial slides. Navigate forward and back by drag or tap.

items.name: sphere-lines
items.title: Wireframe Globe
items.description: A wire-frame globe that breathes on its own — a narrow wave band drifts quietly across the surface. Hover to ripple the lines right where your cursor lands.

items.name: stack-tower
items.title: Stack Tower
items.description: A column of 12 stacked words that reads as a rotating 3D cylinder — 2D transforms skew, scale and shift each row so the rotation travels down the stack. Hover lights one row in warm orange without breaking the rhythm.

items.name: sticker-wall
items.title: Sticker Wall
items.description: A draggable sticker card wall. Drop notes, toss emoji, pile them up with real 2D physics.

items.name: taga-toggle
items.title: Taga Toggle
items.description: A playful pill toggle with an expressive face on the thumb — dead (×× eyes, flat mouth) when off, happy (arc eyes, big smile) when on. Track warms from grey to yellow.

items.name: task-cards
items.title: Task Cards
items.description: A swipeable project task card stack where each card has a unique accent colour, status badge, and due date. Drag left or right to cycle through tasks — springs back the dismissed card to the bottom of the deck.

items.name: text-blur-reveal
items.title: Text Blur Reveal
items.description: Words animate into view one by one with a satisfying blur-to-sharp entrance, auto-replaying in a loop.

items.name: tilted-coverflow
items.title: Tilted Coverflow
items.description: 3D coverflow card carousel of seven tilted photos. Drag or arrows to focus any card.

items.name: upload-progress
items.title: Upload Progress
items.description: A collapsible file upload widget with a shimmer progress bar — indigo while uploading, amber on pause. Expand to see per-file rows with live progress, time remaining, and pause, resume, refresh, and stop controls.

items.name: voice-chat-pill
items.title: Live Session Pill
items.description: A compact live-session presence pill with an animated speaking indicator and overlapping avatars — clicks open a soft-UI modal showing all participants with a Join Now button.

items.name: wave-lines
items.title: Wave Lines
items.description: Dense vertical lines that ripple across the canvas — two layered sine waves create organic bunching and breathing. Hover to send the lines into extreme waves across the whole canvas.

items.name: wild-morph
items.title: Wild Morph
items.description: Italic SVG word that warps under the cursor — a spring-physics text animation.

items.name: x-grid
items.title: X Grid
items.description: A canvas-based interactive background of × marks that illuminate and connect to neighbours with constellation lines on hover.

items.name: andromeda-tokens
items.title: Andromeda tokens
items.description: Foundation files for the Andromeda design system — tokens, shared utilities, and the system mark. Required by every Andromeda component and template.

items.name: andromeda
items.title: Andromeda design system
items.description: Every Andromeda component (37 files). Installs the foundation tokens automatically.

items.title: Alert (Andromeda)
items.description: Andromeda Alert component. Install just this piece. Tokens and any sibling components are pulled in automatically.
